message:
✨ Update cloud provider icons to official logos

- EKS: Blue hexagon with white inner hexagon and K letter
- GKE: Blue rounded hexagon with 3D cube/container icon
- AKS: Purple gradient isometric cubes pattern
- Kind: Ship in bottle (Kubernetes IN Docker)
- Minikube: Hexagon with container and helm wheel
- K3s: Yellow background with white three-blade propeller
- Alibaba ACK: Orange hexagon with connected cube nodes
- Rancher: Blue background with white cow head
- DigitalOcean: Blue arc with pixel squares

Also updates demo data to include one cluster of each provider
type to showcase all icons on the cluster dashboard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:

     case 'kind': return 'border-blue-400/40'

     case 'k3s': return 'border-yellow-500/40'

+    // One cluster for each provider type to showcase all icons
